name: English Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. Mix flour, salt, and sugar in a bowl.
3. Add butter to the mixture; blend until well combined.
4. Incorporate shortening and mix further. The dough should resemble crumbs.
5. Gradually add cold water, distributing evenly throughout.
6. Form into a ball, wrap in plastic, and chill for at least 30 minutes.
7. Roll out on pastry board to 1/8-inch thickness; use waxed paper if needed.
8. Transfer to a 9-inch pie pan without stretching the dough.
9. Prick bottom thoroughly; place foil under crust.
10. Bake until lightly browned (about 20 minutes).
11. Remove weights and foil, return to oven for another 10 minutes.
12. Prepare filling: press cottage cheese through sieve.
13. Warm cream and sherry in saucepan without scorching.
14. Beat eggs, yolks, sugar, rosewater, and spices until frothy.
15. Mix beaten ingredients with cottage cheese, then add warm cream mixture.
16. Stir in currants; pour into crust.
17. Bake for about 30 minutes; cool before serving.
18. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
